global_hint: Welcome to the CyberQA Campaign. Find 3 flags. You may need to revisit old directories to find clues for new tasks. Start by finding the hidden_admin directory.

admin_notes.txt.content: Note to self: The /vault password is Base64 encoded. The cipher is: YWRtaW5fcGFzcw==

sys_error.log.content: CRITICAL: Backup moved to /secure_zone. Password is the admin's dog's name reversed. Check chat_history.log.

logs.chat_history.log: Admin: Hey, can someone feed Buster? I locked myself out of the secure_zone again.
